content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat   Business   NAB Portal Pay   Payer help and support   Administration support   Change or close your account   Change or close your account   Learn how you can update your account details in NAB Portal Pay.   Change your account details   Log in to NAB Portal Pay, opens in new window  , enter your email address and password and select Log in.  Select Profile from the grey navigation bar.  Once on the profile page, you will be able to edit your personal information or contact details, change your password and close your profile.  If you update any of your details, you’ll receive an email notifying you that your profile has been updated.  Please note you will not be able to change the email address linked to your account as this is used as your username.  Close your profile  Log in to NAB Portal Pay, opens in new window  , enter your email address and password and select Log in.  Select Profile from the grey navigation bar.  Select Close my profile. You will have to delete all saved payees (such as a real estate agent) and scheduled payments to be able to delete your account. If you want to keep your payment history, make sure you save a copy of it.  Once you’ve successfully met the profile closure requirements, confirm by selecting Yes, close my profile.  We’ll send you an email to let you know that you’ve closed your profile.  Related guides   See some of our other guides to help you get the most out of NAB Portal Pay.  Change your password   Use our step-by-step instructions to learn how to change your password in NAB Portal Pay.  Cancel scheduled payments   Use our step-by-step instructions to learn how to cancel scheduled payments in NAB Portal Pay.  View payment history   Use our step-by-step instructions to learn how to view your payment history in NAB Portal Pay.  Get in touch  Contact NAB Portal Pay   If you need support, reach out to us and provide your name, registered email address, registered mobile number and real estate agency.  Send an email   Important Information   Important information  This section contains Important Information relevant to the page you are viewing, but you can't see it because you have JavaScript disabled on your browser. Please enable JavaScript and come back so you can see the complete page. It's important that you read the Important Information in this section before acting on any information on this page.  Apologies but the Important Information section you are trying to view is not displaying properly at the moment. Please refresh the page or try again later.
